# ELF header
7f45 4c46           # 0000 | Magic
          02        # 0004 | Class   (ELFCLASS32 = 1, ELFCLASS64 = 2)
            01      # 0005 | Data    (ELFDATA2LSB = 1, ELFDATA2MSB = 2)
               01   # 0006 | Version (EV_CURRENT = 1)
                 00 # 0007 | OS & ABI
0000 0000 0000 0000 # 0008 | Padding
0200                # 0010 | e_type = 2 (executable object)
     3e00           # 0012 | e_machine = 0x3e
          0100 0000 # 0014 | e_version = 1
0010 4000 0000 0000 # 0018 | e_entry = 0x401000
4000 0000 0000 0000 # 0020 | e_phoff = 0x40
2021 0000 0000 0000 # 0028 | e_shoff = 0x2120
0000 0000           # 0030 | e_flags = 0
          4000      # 0034 | e_ehsize = 0x40
               3800 # 0036 | e_phentsize = 0x38
0400                # 0038 | e_phnum = 4
     4000           # 003a | e_shentsize = 0x40
          0500      # 003c | e_shnum = 5
               0400 # 003e | e_shstrndx = 4

# Program header 0 (map ELF header and program headers to memory)
0100 0000           # 0040 | p_type = 1 (PT_LOAD)
          0400 0000 # 0044 | p_flags = 4 (PF_R)
0000 0000 0000 0000 # 0048 | p_offset = 0x0 (0)
0000 4000 0000 0000 # 0050 | p_vaddr = 0x400000
0000 4000 0000 0000 # 0058 | p_paddr = (not used in a virtual memory system)
2001 0000 0000 0000 # 0060 | p_filesz = 0x120 (288)
2001 0000 0000 0000 # 0068 | p_memsz = 0x120 (288)
0010 0000 0000 0000 # 0070 | p_align = 0x1000

          0500 0000 # 007c | p_flags = 5 (PF_R | PF_X)
0010 0000 0000 0000 # 0080 | p_offset = 0x1000
0010 4000 0000 0000 # 0088 | p_vaddr = 0x401000
0010 4000 0000 0000 # 0090 | p_paddr = (not used in a virtual memory system)
4e01 0000 0000 0000 # 0098 | p_filesz = 0x14e (334)

0010 0000 0000 0000 # 00a8 | p_align = 0x1000

0020 4000 0000 0000 # 00c0 | p_vaddr = 0x402000
